framework.name: Agentic Commerce Trust Framework Requirements
framework.description: A common trust framework needed across all parties (consumers, agents, merchants, issuers) addressing: (1) Agent authentication and authorization, (2) Malicious agent prevention, (3) Transaction transparency, (4) Consumer control boundaries, (5) First-party fraud detection (was transaction truly authorized?), (6) Error handling (wrong items, addresses).
framework.raw_quote: All these parties have one thing in common that they can all benefit from a common trust framework... making sure that a malicious agent should not be able to transact... ensuring that agents can only transact within the bounds of consumers instructions.
